name: XM1014 | 红色皮革
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. Its stock and grip have been wrapped in red leather. Pack your baags. Let's go kill that sonofabitch... - The Oni and The Valkyrie Part 2
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 枪托和握把用红色皮革包裹。 整理好你的背包。让我们干翻那些狗娘养的… -《鬼与女武神（下）》
